integration_validation_v2.evidence: comfy.rs:356-358 reject_direct_localhost_comfy_execution rejects loopback/machine-local execution; comfy.rs:190-232 scrub_provenance recursively redacts authorization/token/cookie/secret keys and is applied on every persisted receipt/evidence path (e.g. record_comfy_workflow_receipt:2642, identity:386-392). Localhost rejection tested at routing_tests.rs:173-192; secret scrub-on-persist proven against real PG at atelier_comfy_tests.rs:813-816 (failure evidence Authorization -> [REDACTED]) and 1238-1250.

integration_validation_v3.basis: v2 PASS re-affirmed in v3: deliverable unchanged by remediation diff; full-crate test sweep green on Handshake-managed PostgreSQL at 17b2abd4 proves no regression. v2 evidence retained in integration_validation_v2.

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
